description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a brown door, a covered porch, and a set of wide steps leading up from a small green lawn. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some green landscaping elements visible along the sides. The rear and side views reveal additional green spaces and a walled perimeter, suggesting a private yard or garden area. The overall structure is two stories tall, with a prominent flat roof and minimal decorative detailing.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a recessed entryway with steps and a small lawn. The exterior is finished in light gray and white, with green landscaping and a walled perimeter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, brown door, wide steps, covered porch, and green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window openings, and the walled perimeter extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional green space, back steps, and the continuation of the walled yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with flat roof sections, minimal windows, and the full length of the walled boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a brown door, wide steps, covered porch, and minimal decorative elements.
